scripts.build: npm run build -w @bndynet/chat-messages && npm run build -w @bndynet/chat-renderers
scripts.dev: concurrently -n messages,renderers,demo -c cyan,yellow,green "npm run dev -w @bndynet/chat-messages" "npm run dev -w @bndynet/chat-renderers" "npm run dev -w chat-demo"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run dev
